creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #0)
> ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libLLVM-8.so"
> ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libLLVM-8.so"
> ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libLLVM-8.so"
> ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libncurses.so.8" not found, required by "libLLVM-8.so"

libLLVM-8.so is part of devel/llvm80. Over to the respective maintainer. 

poudriere is not affected because it rebuilds *all* packages on OSVERSION bumps.
